title: stephanomeria elata
intro: Stephanomeria elata, also known as the Woolly Stephanomeria or Woolly Wirelettuce, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stephanomeria elata include its ability to relieve digestive problems, soothe skin irritations, and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
